summary: Iteration 14 - 5 new features testing: Redis Cache Layer, VAPID Push Notifications, Gelir/Gider (Financials) Module, HotelRunner Improvements. All 29/29 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend testing successful - login, dashboard, financials page (3 tabs), income/expense forms, navigation all working.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>/<tbody>/<tr>. This is from Emergent visual editor wrapper - cosmetic warning only, does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Redis cache implementation is correct - Falls back to in-memory if Redis unavailable
Cache backend correctly shows 'redis' in /api/cache/stats when Redis is running
VAPID keys are properly configured in backend/.env - public key returned by /api/notifications/vapid-key
Financials module has complete CRUD - 7 income categories, 17 expense categories
Commission calculation working correctly (commission_amount, net_amount computed)
Monthly summary includes KPIs (occupancy_rate, ADR, RevPAR) and daily_trend
HotelRunner cancellation policy correctly identifies special days (weekends, holidays)
HotelRunner webhook processes reservation.created events and stores in MongoDB
All HotelRunner sync endpoints work in mock mode - clearly labeled as mock

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, dashboard, financials tabs, income/expense forms, navigation all working)

seed_data_creation: Existing financial data: income ₺7,500 (room booking with 15% commission), expense ₺1,200 (food supplies)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified 5 features: (1) Redis Cache - backend='redis' in /api/cache/stats, cache hits working after double API calls, /api/cache/clear resets. (2) VAPID Push - /api/notifications/vapid-key returns publicKey (86 chars), /api/notifications/subscribers returns count, /api/notifications/send-test returns success. (3) Financials Module - Complete CRUD for income/expense, GET /api/financials/categories returns 7+17 categories, daily/monthly summaries with KPIs (occupancy, ADR, RevPAR), channel-based income breakdown with commission tracking. (4) HotelRunner - /api/hotelrunner/status shows mock_mode=true with 5 OTA channels (booking, expedia, airbnb, google, trivago), /api/hotelrunner/cancellation-penalty calculates penalty for special days (100%) vs regular days (0% if >3 days), /api/hotelrunner/webhook processes reservation.created events, /api/hotelrunner/sync/full returns mock results. (5) Frontend - Finansal page has 3 tabs (Genel Bakis, Gelir, Gider), KPI cards visible, add-income/expense forms work, notification bell in sidebar.

redis_cache.cache_hit_verification: PASS - Calling /api/rooms twice shows cache hit increase

categories.expense: 17 categories (food_supplies, beverages, cleaning, energy, salary, insurance, maintenance, marketing, commission, tax, rent, equipment, laundry, garden, entertainment, software, other)

endpoints.GET /api/financials/expense: PASS - Returns records with date filtering

endpoints.GET /api/hotelrunner/channels: PASS - Returns 5 channels with commission rates
endpoints.POST /api/hotelrunner/cancellation-penal: PASS - Calculates penalty (special day 100%, regular >3 days 0%)

cancellation_policy.regular_days: >3 days before check-in = free cancellation, <=3 days = 100% penalty

financials_page.channel_income_breakdown: WORKING - Shows Booking channel with gross/commission/net
